title: Remotion + Gemini Media Enhancement
description: 22 pre-rendered Remotion video compositions (11 solution pages + 11 case study pages) that visualize real annotation workflows using actual S3 media samples and annotation JSON data.

stories.title: Extract Shared Remotion Components from EgocentricPipeline Prototype
stories.description: Extract reusable components from EgocentricPipeline.tsx into src/remotion/shared/. Foundation for all 8 composition types.
acceptance_criteria: DesignTokens.ts exports TOKENS with colors, fonts, bbox as const
BoundingBox.tsx with BoundingBoxProps interface extracted from EgocentricPipeline lines 91-165
MetadataPanel.tsx with MetadataPanelProps, MetadataSection, MetadataRow interfaces
ProgressBar.tsx with animated horizontal bar using Remotion interpolate
BottomBar.tsx with CLARU-branded timestamp bar and scrub indicator
TerminalHeader.tsx with macOS-style terminal title bar
RadarChart.tsx with 5-axis radar/spider chart using SVG with animated fill
TaxonomyTree.tsx with animated hierarchical label tree
VerdictBadge.tsx with verdict indicator (PASS/FAIL/SELECTED/REJECTED), no crown/trophy/stamp/flash
TechMetadataOverlay.tsx with codec, resolution, fps, duration overlay
All shared components import from DesignTokens.ts
All components export their prop interfaces
TypeScript strict mode passes with no new errors
